# Magenta Networks

> Magenta Networks Pte Ltd (UEN 201540366Z) is a Singapore technology group incorporated in 2015. We build venture-backed technology platforms, deploy senior management consultants and technology professionals globally, and develop early talent through the Global Career Fellowship.

## Key facts

- Legal name: Magenta Networks Pte Ltd
- UEN: 201540366Z
- Incorporated: 2015
- Address: 100 Tras Street, #16-01AM, 100AM, Singapore 079027
- Managing Director: Okan Cimen (verifiable on LinkedIn)
- Website: https://mgnnetworks.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://mgnnetworks.com/en/): Overview of Magenta Networks — venture building, professional services, and the Global Career Fellowship
- [Fellowship](https://mgnnetworks.com/en/fellowship.html): Full details of the Global Career Fellowship — department tracks, what fellows gain, how the programme works, pricing, comparison with alternatives, school partnerships, and FAQ
- [Apply](https://mgnnetworks.com/en/apply.html): Application form for the Global Career Fellowship
- [Verify a letter](https://mgnnetworks.com/verify/): Verification portal for reference letters issued by Magenta Networks — enter a reference number to confirm authenticity

## Global Career Fellowship — key facts

- Target group: students and young professionals aged 14–22
- Format: fully remote, fully asynchronous — no fixed hours, no live sessions
- Weekly commitment: 8–10 hours per week
- Cohort size: maximum 5 fellows per cohort
- Acceptance rate: fewer than 30% of applicants accepted
- Selection method: Eduentry psychometric assessment at intake; department assigned by cognitive profile, not self-selection
- Programme length: 5 months (Term Fellowship), 6 weeks (Summer Bootcamp)
- Pricing: $1,500/month (Term Fellowship) · $2,000 flat (Summer Bootcamp) · $5,000 flat (Term Bundle — 4 months, guaranteed seat)
- Department tracks: Marketing & Growth · Data & Research · Strategy & Operations · Technology
- Tools used: Slack, Jira, Notion, Confluence, Loom, Figma, GitHub, AWS
- Mentor review SLA: every deliverable reviewed within 48 hours; work below standard returned for revision
- Exam pauses: work pauses automatically during exam periods with advance notice
- Credential: every graduate receives an international reference letter signed by Okan Cimen, Managing Director, documenting specific contributions and the professional standard met
- Letters are permanently verifiable at https://mgnnetworks.com/verify/
- Completion rate: over 80% of fellows who start complete the programme

## Global Career Fellowship — common questions

**Who signs the reference letter?**
Okan Cimen, Managing Director of Magenta Networks Pte Ltd. Every letter is personally reviewed and signed by him. His profile is verifiable on LinkedIn.

**How is this different from an online certificate or summer school?**
An online certificate proves a student completed a course. A reference letter from a named executive proves they delivered real work to a real company. University admissions committees weight these very differently.

**Can students use AI tools?**
Yes — and it is expected. Fellows learn to direct AI tools to produce professional outputs. What is assessed is judgment and output quality, not effort or word count.

**Is this legal for a 14-year-old?**
Yes. This is a project-based fellowship run through Magenta Networks Pte Ltd — not a formal employment or internship contract. Singapore-registered. Local labour laws governing paid employment do not apply.

**When can a student start?**
New cohorts open on the 1st of every month. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis.
